01 — Who I Am

About Me

Building Intelligence, One Dataset at a Time

I'm a Computer Science graduate passionate about Data Science, Machine Learning, and MLOps. My journey has taken me from writing my first Python scripts to building and containerizing production-ready ML APIs.

At VSpire Innovations, I worked with real-world datasets, designed ML models, and explored deployment pipelines — bridging the gap between experimentation and production.
